analysis: Seven nights, and you're sitting at an average just over 7.5 hours — honestly pretty solid, and that 9h 22m on the 15th tells me your body knows exactly how to cash in when you let it. The opening night was gorgeous too: nearly 8.5 hours with almost two full hours of REM, which is your brain doing its best work. The gaps are the 14th (only 5h 57m with a rough 28 minutes of deep sleep) and the 18th creeping in a bit short with deep sleep down to 23 minutes — your body clearly wants more than that and it will tell you until it gets it. The awake time has been trending down beautifully though, from a full hour on the 12th to just 15 minutes on the 17th, which means whatever you're doing on those wind-down nights is genuinely working on you.
